commands: Revise the analysis of composite indexes to include a discussion on the potential negative impact on write operations due to increased maintenance overhead and storage requirements.
Provide a more detailed justification for the use of partial indexes, including specific criteria for their implementation and how they will balance performance with storage efficiency.
Expand on the implications of increased storage requirements for the proposed indexing strategy and suggest ways to mitigate these concerns, such as periodic index review and optimization.

Include a section on monitoring and evaluating the effectiveness of the new indexing strategy post-implementation to ensure that performance improvements are realized without compromising write performance.
